mapper.select:
select * from nx_customer_referral_reward_rule where community_id = #{communityId} and rule_code = #{ruleCode} and reward_target = #{rewardTarget} and enabled = 1 and (rule_status is null or rule_status = 1) and (trigger_type is null or trigger_type = #{triggerType})
and (beneficiary_type is null or beneficiary_type = #{beneficiaryType})
and (effective_start_at is null or effective_start_at <= #{now}) and (effective_end_at is null or effective_end_at >= #{now}) order by priority desc, nx_customer_referral_reward_rule_id asc
